💡 Tips
Select a Category first to unlock sub-categories and items.
Use Reference # to attach receipt numbers for easy audit.
Set status to Approved only after manager sign-off.
# Date Category Sub-Category Item Description Amount Reference Submitted By Submitted At Actions

No submitted expenses
Expenses marked as Submitted from the Prepared list will appear here for review

Expense Categories
Category → Sub-Category → Item · Add on the left, browse & manage on the right
📁 Category
Top-level grouping
Add New Category
💡 Categories are the broadest level. Add sub-categories and items from the tree on the right.
How it works
📁
Category
e.g. Utilities
↓
📂
Sub-Category
e.g. Electricity
↓
🏷️
Item
e.g. Meralco Bill
📂 Sub-Category / Item / Edit
Click + Sub, + Item, or ✏️ on the tree →
👉
Use the tree on the right to
+ Sub, + Item, or ✏️ rename
any category, sub-category, or item.
📁 Adding sub to:
Sub-Category Name
💡 Sub-categories sit under the parent category. You can add items inside each sub-category.
📂 Adding item to:
Item Name
💡 Items are the most specific level — they appear when logging actual expenses.
✏️ Rename
New Name

Quick Guide
🏪 Business Info — name, address, appearance

Backup & Export
Loading summary…
Restore from Backup
Select a previously exported JSON backup file. Choose which sections to restore — only the checked sections will be overwritten.
⚠️ Danger Zone
This will permanently delete ALL data from Firebase and local storage — inventory, orders, customers, tables, kitchen orders, shifts, audit logs, and all settings. Users will be preserved. This action cannot be undone.
📋
Audit Log
🧾
Tax Configuration
When inclusive, tax is extracted from the item price rather than added on top.
Bulk action: turns on VAT for every existing product in inventory.
💁
Service Charge
Service charge is applied before tax calculation.
🧾
Receipt Numbering (BIR)
OR = Official Receipt, SI = Sales Invoice
Preview: OR-000001
🧾
Receipt Numbering

Configure receipt/OR/SI numbering for BIR compliance. These settings are also available under Tax & Finance.

Preview: OR-000001
🕐
Happy Hour / Time-Based Pricing
Enable Happy Hour

Define time windows with automatic price discounts. Active rules show a badge on menu items.

Inventory & Kitchen Settings
📦 Inventory

Products at or below this stock level will trigger low-stock alerts and banner warnings.

🍳 Kitchen Timer

Timer turns orange after this many minutes.

Timer turns red and blinks after this many minutes.
